zh.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Egerton於1296年出生在英國英格蘭爾艾格頓時，他的父親David de Egerton20歲，母親Isabella Fulleshurst19歲。他於1316年1月12日與Ellen St. Pierre在英國爾艾格頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1363年在英國英格蘭爾其其享年67歲。

zh-hans.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Egerton于1296年出生在英国英格兰爾艾格頓时，他的父亲David de Egerton20岁，母亲Isabella Fulleshurst19岁。他于1316年1月12日与Ellen St. Pierre在英国爾艾格頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1363年在英国英格兰爾其其享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Edgerton  .

variants.name: Edgerton
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Egerton was born in 1296, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, David de Egerton, was 20 and his mother, Isabella Fulleshurst, was 19. He married Ellen St. Pierre on 12 January 1316, in Egerton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1363, in Whitchurch, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Egerton est né en 1296, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, David d’Egerton, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Isabella Fulleshurst, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Ellen St. Pierre le 12 janvier 1316, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1363, à Whitchurch, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Egerton 1296 in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater David de Egerton 20 und seine Mutter Isabella Fulleshurst 19. Er hat am 12. Januar 1316 in Egerton, Cheshire, England Ellen St. Pierre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1363 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Whitchurch, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Egerton è nato il nel 1296 nel Egerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, David de Egerton, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Fulleshurst, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Ellen St. Pierre il 12 gennaio 1316, nel Egerton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1363, nel Whitchurch, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Egertonが1296年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで生まれた時，父David de Egertonは20歳，母Isabella Fulleshurstは19歳であった。1316年1月12日にイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンでEllen St. Pierreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1363年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウィトチャーチで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Egerton(이)가 1296년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 거턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David de Egerton(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Fulleshurst(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1316년 1월 12일 영국 체실르 거턴에서 Ellen St. Pierre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1363년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 휘트c후르치에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Egerton nasceu em 1296, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, David de Egerton, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Fulleshurst, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen St. Pierre em 12 de janeiro de 1316, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1363, em Whitchurch, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Egerton родился в 1296 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени David de Egerton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Fulleshurst, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen St. Pierre 12 января 1316 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1363 г. в местности уичурч, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Egerton nació en 1296, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, David de Egerton, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Isabella Fulleshurst, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Ellen St. Pierre el 12 de enero de 1316, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1363, en Whitchurch, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
